title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York, NY (with Tel Aviv HQ collaboration)
description: Finout is seeking a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine, reporting directly to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer role at a cloud cost intelligence company with 100+ people across Tel Aviv and New York, backed by $85M+ in funding.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, direct RevOps/GTM expertise aligns perfectly, B2B SaaS and Fintech domain knowledge are ideal for cloud cost intelligence, and leadership scale (100+ people, $85M+ funded) matches senior executive profile. Only minor friction is New York primary location vs. Tel Aviv preference, though HQ collaboration mitigates this.
ai_opener: Omri, your track record scaling revenue operations in B2B SaaS aligns directly with Finout's mission to become the operational backbone of GTM at scale. With your depth in Salesforce administration, pipeline forecasting, and cross-functional leadership in high-growth environments, you're uniquely positioned to drive the revenue infrastructure that cloud cost intelligence demands—especially given the complexity of selling to engineering and finance buyers simultaneously.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: As a Revenue Operations Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations, you'll accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM planning, deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models and segmentation, strong analytical skills with Excel/SQL/BI tools (Tableau, Retool), and Salesforce proficiency. Experience with territory management tools like Fullcast, Pigment, or Anaplan is a plus. Gong is a leader in revenue intelligence.
score_reason: Perfect alignment with Omri's senior RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS background, and Salesforce proficiency. Territory strategy, pipeline forecasting, and data-driven GTM are core strengths; only minor gap is specific territory management tool experience, easily acquirable.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed your 15+ years building revenue engines in B2B SaaS aligns exceptionally well with Gong's Territory Strategy & Operations role. Your track record with CAC/LTV optimization and pipeline forecasting directly addresses their need for data-driven territory design at scale. Given Gong's position as the revenue intelligence leader, your GTM strategy background could be transformational for their seller productivity initiatives.

title: GTM Engineer

Your positioning as the first GTM Engineer is exactly the kind of high-impact technical operator role I'm excited about—owning platform setup, optimization, and enablement across a fast-scaling org.
